subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-Qablih-Husayn, tyrant of the land! O fire that hath been kindled and shall not be quenched! Ere long shall come the recompense of deeds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قبل حسین ظالم ارض یا آتشی افروخته که خاموشی نپذیرد عنقریب جزای اعمال
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for protection, @chastisement and requital, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @justice and wrath of God
